title: Manga to end June 4th
wikitext:
[]: Manga to end June 4th             Quote Post by KusanagiShiro » Sat May 04, 2013 10:10 pm Just confirmed by Sadamoto via ANN

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat May 04, 2013 10:40 pm Yep. It was mentioned on EGF's Twitter, but not an EGF thread itself: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by Catamari » Sat May 04, 2013 11:42 pm Sadamoto's may, but I doubt this is the last we will see of an Evangelion manga. I can see a bunch of young players making their own spinoffs. Not fap-doujinshi, either, something beefier, more like Retake.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sun May 05, 2013 12:22 am It's the end of an era. And we'd just been joking that it would outlast Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun May 05, 2013 12:42 am Fap doujinshi of Eva will never end.

[]:             Quote Post by AlphaGamma » Sun May 05, 2013 12:47 am Catamari wrote: Sadamoto's may, but I doubt this is the last we will see of an Evangelion manga. I can see a bunch of young players making their own spinoffs. Not fap-doujinshi, either, something beefier, more like Retake .

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sun May 05, 2013 1:50 am AR-99 wrote: Fap doujinshi of Eva will never end.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Sun May 05, 2013 10:57 am oh wow its actually ending never thought I'd see the day haha

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun May 05, 2013 9:01 pm If the final chapter drops in June I'm happy to see that Asuka is the cover character and that an Asuka poster is one of the giveaways. Will pick up. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Sun May 05, 2013 9:18 pm I'm a little amazed that it is finally the end. And I'm a little sad about it too. Unlike many of you, I first came across Eva through the manga and then watched the anime much later on. So in a sense for me, the manga was what I thought of first when it came to Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon May 06, 2013 1:21 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Yep. It was mentioned on EGF's Twitter, but not an EGF thread itself:

[]:             Quote Post by AlphaGamma » Mon May 06, 2013 1:42 am AR-99 wrote: If the final chapter drops in June I'm happy to see that Asuka is the cover character and that an Asuka poster is one of the giveaways. Will pick up. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by red » Mon May 06, 2013 5:16 am Takes me back, being 14 (so...~2001) and discussing with a friend starting the Evangelion Manga and a friend telling me "Don't do it, Sadamoto's taking two years to write each volume!". How right he was.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Mon May 06, 2013 5:22 am REBUILD MANGA REBUILD MANGA REBUILD MANGA

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Mon May 06, 2013 7:30 am Anyone expect's an announcement with the end of the magna?Something like eva manga gets animated,a rebuild manga or something like that?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon May 06, 2013 7:38 am Dima wrote: Anyone expect's an announcement with the end of the magna?Something like eva manga gets animated,a rebuild manga or something like that?

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Mon May 06, 2013 8:43 am AlphaGamma wrote: Still, if Asuka isn't the focus of the last chapter i can see many fans being "unhappy", considering she never even appears in this last volume.

[]:             Quote Post by AlphaGamma » Mon May 06, 2013 9:02 am bladerj wrote: sadamoto prefers Rei, he said so.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon May 06, 2013 9:26 am AlphaGamma wrote: It is established in the manga that Rei and Shinji don't have romantic feelings for each other (even though she has more panel time than in the anime).

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon May 06, 2013 11:16 am AlphaGamma wrote: The cover with Asuka was the one that came out in May (4 days ago) and it was in no way indicative of the content of the chapter (Young Ace of a certain month comes out at the beginning of the previous month...) It's probably gonna have a cover with Asuka/Rei/Shinji in June or nothing Eva-related at all, considering there are other ongoing mangas in Young Ace. Still, if Asuka isn't the focus of the last chapter i can see many fans being "unhappy", considering she never even appears in this last volume.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat May 04, 2013 10:40 pm Yep. It was mentioned on EGF's Twitter, but not an EGF thread itself: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').fo
